english: the house in that village is nice
they talk about mathematics

lampung: sanak si disuttik ino mak sihat
indonesian: anak yang disuntik itu tidak sehat
english: the child who was injected is not healthy

lampung: tiyan ninjuk maling di anek ijo
indonesian: mereka menangkap maling di dusun ini
english: they caught a thief in this village
the child argued with their friend

lampung: ikam mak muppeh kaway di way balak
indonesian: saya tidak mencuci baju di sungai
english: i do not wash clothes in the river

lampung: tono ngejuk kanen punyeu di kulam ani
indonesian: tono memberi makanan ikan di kolam ani
english: tono gives fish food in ani's pond
he only sleeps
i cried because my foot was stepped on

lampung: ikam ago lapah dak danau ranau mak cakak bes
indonesian: kami mau pergi ke danau ranau tidak naik bus
english: we want to go to lake ranau without taking a bus

lampung: ani mulang anjak way kambas neen bingei
indonesian: ani pulang dari way kambas nanti malam
english: ani comes home from way kambas tonight

lampung: mulei ino mejeng di pinggir lawet
indonesian: gadis itu duduk di pinggir laut
english: the girl sits by the sea

lampung: meghanai ino ngakuk jambeu di nuwo armin
indonesian: bujang itu mengambil jambu di rumah armin
english: the young man takes guava at armin's house
ani is beautiful
the child eats the cake
father is at home
he goes at one o'clock

lampung: ikam lagey mandei di way balak
english: i am bathing in the river

lampung: murid-murid tunggo bu gureu di sekulah
indonesian: murid-murid bertemu bu guru di sekolah
english: the students meet the teacher at school

lampung: kendaraan liyew dakjo dinei di depan nuwono
indonesian: kendaraan berlalu lalang di depan rumahnya
english: vehicles pass by in front of his house
arif is studying
his mother calls tono
yesterday komariah bought mangoes
i am not sick
this letter is for me
